name: Robert Klein
abstract: Robert Klein (born February 8, 1942) is an American stand-up comedian, singer, and actor. He is known for his appearances on stage and screen.

concerts.label: Lauri Strauss Leukemia Foundation Benefit Concert
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Catherine Russell
about_quotes.evidence: I started working for Robert Klein, comedian Robert Klein when he had a little music in his shows
